sections.instruction: Complete the sentence/form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for Question 1, NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for Questions 2-5, THREE WORDS for Question 6, choose the correct letter A-C for Question 7, and write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for Questions 8-10.

options: her major would help her satisfy various interests
she was not at first interested in the health field
her parents helped her to select her major

sections.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for Questions 11-13, NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for Questions 14-20.

questions.content:
(17) On this map of school, A is the {{BLANK}}
(18) and B is the {{BLANK}}

(19) The headmistress says getting dirty in the garden is good for the children’s {{BLANK}}.
(20) There are inside the cupboard of the first classroom {{BLANK}}.

sections.instruction: Choose TWO letters A-E for Questions 21-22, answer in NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for Questions 23-28, and choose TWO letters A-F for Questions 29-30.

options: she was busy doing something for Harry and Bob
she had a problem with a shoe
she had too many phone calls
the time for reviewing is limited
when reviewing, it is best to take a five minute break every hour
when reviewing, one should walk around once an hour
reviewing separately is not a good idea
Harry and Bob should question each other regularly while reviewing

sections.instruction: Fill in the form using NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for Questions 31-35, complete the sentences with NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for Questions 36-38, and choose TWO letters A-E for Questions 39-40.

questions.content: According to the talk which of the following are right?
options: the club does not need a large golf practice range
the range is close to the site of the proposed school
the parents insist on no computer games
the parents want a cafeteria selling fast food to save students’ time
musical instruments are included in the budget
